title: vitis vitacea
intro: Vitis vitacea, also known as the Mission grape, is a species of wild grapevine native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Vitis vitacea include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve symptoms of anxiety and stress, and support immune function. Vitis vitacea can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
